1: An absence of karmic tasks as such (apart from the tasks of the family line). People at this level are not set any particular goals, nor required to pursue self-development. You may occupy yourself with anything you wish. The only condition: these people must live in harmony with their own conscience.
10: The first level. This means you should devote your main attention to developing your personality, cultivating willpower, and refining both body and spirit. Earthly affairs await you, while the higher matters are not yet meant for you.

30: This is the level of people capable of influencing the consciousness of those around them. If you stand at the third level of incarnation, know that your calling in this life is to teach others a philosophical view of life and the fundamentals of existence. For this reason, you yourself have much to learn, so that you may later pass your knowledge on to others.

5: An absence of karmic tasks as such (apart from the tasks of the family line). People at this level are not set any particular goals, nor required to pursue self-development. 50: A person of the fifth level is an observer, a mediator between the Higher Mind and humankind. You are a bearer of sacred knowledge. Your purpose is self-perfection in solitude. Yet this does not mean that those belonging to this level are always luminous and pure. Very often they are the favorites of fate, who receive all blessings more easily than others. One can frequently observe how such people cease to watch over themselves, to cultivate their soul, and so they fall. They begin to live only by consuming. Naturally, in the life to come, retribution and a descent to a lower level await them. This level obliges one to lead a way of life that enriches the soul and ennobles the family line.
